ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned] Friend, I can help, but the terms must stay fair today. Keep it honest and we can settle this quickly in my talkative style.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4

[baseline_no_context] Ah, my dear traveler! While the urgency of your quest does not escape me, offering such generous terms would disrupt our delicate balance here at this humble stall.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>3
The response shows some relevance to context and maintains persona consistency but lacks naturalness in tone, which could be improved for a more authentic NPC interaction.
